title: Skypiea Sees the Storm
description: The golden bell becomes the symbol that can connect the sky, the earth, and Mont Blanc Cricket’s dream below.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Gan Fall. The golden bell becomes the symbol that can connect the sky, the earth, and Mont Blanc Cricket’s dream below.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I think that's our only escape option!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I'll distract him somehow! Make the preparations!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Nooo! Just thinking about it is painful!

summary: The golden bell becomes the symbol that can connect the sky, the earth, and Mont Blanc Cricket’s dream below.
